name: OAuth refresh-token heartbeat
description: Daily ping of registered Google OAuth files to keep refresh_tokens alive. Google's Testing-mode OAuth apps expire refresh_tokens after 7 days of non-use. This agent calls refresh-token.py once a day to reset the 7-day clock so SEO/GSC/GA4 access stays live even when the seo-opportunity-agent is paused for extended periods. Emails the operator if a refresh fails — early warning before downstream agents break.
